message:
test(bd-1659): add 18 unit tests for auth.rs

Cover AllowAllAuthProvider derives (Debug, Default, Clone, Copy),
TokenAuthProvider clone and custom error with valid token,
StaticTokenVerifier debug/clone/multiple tokens/multiple schemes,
extract_from_value edge cases (bool, null, nested objects),
_meta and headers fallback priority, auth_error helper, and
scheme-token with whitespace. Server test count: 1098.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
